name: Ameeya
ai_summary: Ameeya Robinson from Marietta, GA has experience caring for children ages 1-2 and is available for both full-time and part-time shifts. She demonstrates strong conflict resolution skills by calmly mediating disputes and emphasizes her warm, enthusiastic approach to child development.

transcripts.q3:
My name is Amelia Robinson, I have experience working with children, aged one, I also have experience working with children Age 2. I love working with children because I have just a great understanding of Child Development. I have strong communication skills are genuine patients and emotional control. And I just love working with children. I have
 have a very creative and I just enjoy working with kids.
transcripts.q4: I currently live in Valdosta Georgia, but I will soon be moving to Canton. Georgia. And so I'm looking for jobs that are in the Canton, Woodstock Marietta area and in those surrounding cities.
transcripts.q5: I'm available for full-time shifts, as well as part-time shifts.
transcripts.q6:
My experience dealing with conflict between two children, I always try to stay calm and I always try to calm down both children. I do try to figure out exactly what happened. Although most of the time with the young children, you only get, you know, parts of a story or you only understand parts of a story as they're still learning how to speak correctly. What I would do if
 If I seen another child, hit another child, I would have the child apologize to the other child. Give him a hug. Help them, give them a hug, and just remind the children that we do not hit each other and that we are all friends.
transcripts.q7: I will make a great up kid teacher because I absolutely love working with children. I am very warm and pathetic enthusiastic and creative, and I think that I will enjoy working with children, just as much as they will enjoy being a part of something that I can help to help them grow, and learn and become amazing, young children.
